item.dc:creator: bourbonandbaddecisions

item.title: Peak Masculinity
item.description: Canadian Astronaut Jeremy Hansen and US Astronaut Reid Wiseman embracing and crying after Hansen called down to name a previously undiscovered crater Carroll who had recently died of cancer. The crew had previously discussed this as a possibility. This is what real men do for each other, they support each other and love each other.
item.dc:creator: LordHosk

item.title: It's Thigh Time already in France
item.description:
This is a dress I found in the states at a thrift store
I love it cause it is super floral and I love the colors
AND IT HAS POCKETS
It's a cheap Lularoe brand
But very forgiving and flattering I think
It allows a lot of easy access for the wind to breeze underneath
The colors are really nice.
I know there are no thigh highs in these pics but I hope you still get some joy. Have a nice Thursday everyone.
item.dc:creator: princesscindycat

item.title: One of the darkest days in Lebanon’s recent history! 100 Israeli strikes in 10 minutes across different regions.
item.description: More than 250 have been killed and 1,200 wounded, with the toll expected to rise as civilians remain trapped under the rubble. My heart is aching. I’m still in shock.
item.dc:creator: jee22

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @DungeonDudsNJewels made this! It's a work of art. Check out their profile for more and leave some love.
27 Man Tax: James Garner
“An eye for an eye will only make the whole world blind.” - Mohandas Gandhi So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: 77thtimesthecharm

item.title: My therapist told me to look inside myself
item.description: I'm on twitch most of the time btw PLEASE find me on https://linktr.ee/mcroft07 since I only post a small selection of my work here. Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I just looked at pictures and did what I wanted with the design tbh. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. Thank you to everyone who wants to help me with VPNs etc but please note that I am highly concerned about someone doxxing me so I will not accept any offer on this. I also don't want to pay for a VPN to use ONE website, so I just click through until I can get through, if I can get through, post and interact with the community for a while then turn it off. This is a real threat to me, I have been grabbed in the streets and had people attempt to follow me home before, so I take safety online and offline very seriously. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. No it isn't AI, I fucking hate AI I used to do nothing with my hands and people told me I wasn't really painting, so I started painting bits while lip syncing and while recording and doing the transitions and people still hate it so honestly go fuck yourself and don't watch my shit then you're boring I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. If you're still here, phew gosh this is a LOT I KNOW! I just started taking up reading again and learned that dark romance does NOT mean vampires. My god. I normally read non fiction books to educate myself further and thought I would try something different. Long story short, I found a "dark romance", thought the blurb and cover might be about vampires, didn't see the content warning (kindle skipped to page 1) and it was about DV. Good lord, I'm glad I have therapy today hahahaha fml, I guess I learned the hard way. I'm out here still being a human clown To everyone who thinks I paint it "wrong" you do it, show me it and I will critique it. The difference is that I will try and put myself out there, I respect artists to grow themselves and find their own way and style because I am an artist, not some blindsided bystander buffoon who thinks they know more about a subject they've never tried. Check yourself with your unsolicited advice and criticism. On that topic, I can handle criticism which is usually the defence people take when I point out that I did not ask. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 424
item.description:
Soz everyone, videos were dead so deleted and now we try again.
In the words of my BIL - what language was that?!
Cannot remember where this was from but reminded me of being Sir John in Much Ado About Nothing in high school and then being nicknamed ‘the bastard’ for the rest of the year
item.dc:creator: indigenous101

item.title: PepsiCo Spent 14 Quarters And Billions Of Dollars Discovering That People With Stagnant Wages Cannot Afford $7 Doritos — A Peer Reviewed Analysis Of The Fucking Obvious
item.description: Let us be fucking clear about what PepsiCo actually did. They did not make an error. They executed a deliberate strategy of extracting maximum rent from a captive consumer base — and discovered, after 14 consecutive quarters of contraction, that human beings have a breaking point ??? "Demand destruction" is the clinical term. What it actually describes is this: a corporation raised prices so far beyond any justification rooted in production costs that millions of people simply stopped eating their product. They called this a pricing strategy. It was extraction ??? Note what required BILLIONS in losses and 14 quarters of declining sales to establish: that working people facing stagnant wages, rising rents and gutted social services cannot absorb indefinite price increases on discretionary snack food. This required an entire fucking Bloomberg panel to discover ??? The Doritos crisis is not about chips. It is a precise measurement of exactly how much has been extracted from working people — the moment a $7 bag became the visible threshold of an invisible breaking point ??⚖️ #DemandDestruction #PepsiCo #Doritos #CorporateGreed #Shrinkflation #WorkingClass
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Most amazing project I have ever seen
item.description: I want to give full credit to @lauramathewsart As a degreed engineer with equipment design skills and some artistic capabilities - I am in awe of her innovative and persistent approach. I really want a set of these, just to flap around the house with on weekends. Clearly, I cannot afford to have her make me a set, but I would love to see these mounted to a Disney-style animatronic robot as an art installation in a major museum.
item.dc:creator: DaveSamsonite

item.title: Gabital 59: Innovation
item.description: Innovation is the introduction of something new that improves processes or products in a way that meets market demand.
item.dc:creator: GabitalEN

item.title: The best I can do
item.description:
I’ve had a headache for a week and woke up today and just couldn’t do it. Called into work, took some meds, and slept all day. Not feeling much better. Now all congested and coughing. Prolly gonna go to urgent care tomorrow first thing.
But I couldn’t just not post, I know so many of you are out there following along
So here’s four and a half minutes of the Guatemala Kittens
No weigh-in today, but they all seem happy so I’m not too worried
Best I can do. Sleep well, babies, and sleep well, Imgur
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
